notes: Phase VD.7 — pre-generation visual picker. Curated archetype list. Skeleton fires N parallel VD.1 (VisualDirectorService.generateBrief) calls — one per archetype — passing the archetype's tonePrompt as designPreferences['tone']. Each call returns a DesignTokensJSON; the picker UI renders these as side-by-side palette swatches in the right pane and the user picks one before code generation begins. To grow this list: add a new entry below + push to mchatai-source. Next refreshMchataisourceCache picks it up; no Swift rebuild needed. Keep tonePrompts comma-separated phrases — they're inlined into the VD.1 prompt at the 'tone' position.

archetypes.subtitle: Restrained palette, generous whitespace
archetypes.tonePrompt: editorial, restrained, neutral palette, generous whitespace, borders over shadows, content-first typography

archetypes.subtitle: Neon arcade, pixel-aligned, high contrast
archetypes.tonePrompt: retro arcade, neon glow, pixel-aligned borders, high contrast CTAs, scanline overlay allowed, monospaced display font

archetypes.subtitle: Glass panels, glowing CTAs, moody
archetypes.tonePrompt: dark cinematic, glass panels with subtle blur, glowing CTAs, moody lighting, deep purple primary, orange accent

archetypes.subtitle: Raw, sharp edges, exposed structure
archetypes.tonePrompt: brutalist, raw edges, no rounded corners, monospaced everywhere, exposed structure, warning yellow accent, stark black-on-white or yellow-on-black

archetypes.subtitle: Rounded shapes, warm gradients, gentle motion
archetypes.tonePrompt: soft pastel, rounded corners 12px+, warm gradients, gentle motion, low-contrast text on soft surfaces, friendly approachable
